standard: DMURS Design Manual for Urban Roads and Streets (Version 1.1, 2019)
notes: Direct PDF resolved from the official gov.ie Department of Transport DMURS landing page (assets.gov.ie/static/documents/...version-11.pdf = Version 1.1). Validated ok=true (%PDF, 14.78MB, 165 pages). Covers urban/built-up geometric design (street cross-sections, lower urban design speeds, urban junction/active-travel geometry); mandatory for all road authorities. Closes the urban geometric gap outside the rural-only DN-GEO-03031.
